name: Red Worker Ant
description: An early neutral ant found in large numbers throughout the opening areas of the park. It remains one of the most useful starter creatures because its parts feed into a huge number of recipes.
behavior: It patrols the exits of several anthills while searching for food for the colony. It hunts weevils, picks nectar off the ground, and drags larger resources back into the nest, giving the whole species the feel of a colony that is always busy.
interactionWithPlayer: It stays neutral toward the player, but defends the colony if you anger other red ants or get too close to their eggs. While calm, it often wanders curiously nearby and may even try to steal food from certain containers or dropped backpacks.
interactionWithCreatures: Workers are backed up by red soldier ants and coordinate quickly when something invades the colony. In the more contested anthills, it is common to see them tangled up with cockroaches, spiders, and invading black ants.
strategy: A lone worker falls easily, but groups are still dangerous early on. If you only need parts, the smart play is to peel off loners instead of waking half the colony for a tiny fight.
inflicts: All of its attacks deal chopping damage.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A basic, quick bite that is easy to block.

abilities.name: Charged Bite
abilities.description: It delays briefly before delivering a stronger bite.
